scripts.lint: biome check index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
